mapper.select: SELECT * FROM employee WHERE delmark = TRUE AND role_type = #{roleType} AND realname NOT LIKE '%E2E%' AND realname NOT LIKE '%User Logic%' AND realname NOT LIKE '%Extended%' AND realname NOT LIKE '%项目验收%' AND realname NOT LIKE '%验收%' AND realname NOT LIKE '%测试%' AND deptment_id = #{deptId} ORDER BY realname
SELECT e.*, d.dept_name as deptName FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON e.deptment_id = d.id WHERE e.id = #{id} AND e.delmark = TRUE
mapper.update: UPDATE employee SET realname = #{realname}, title_level = #{titleLevel}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, deptment_id = #{deptmentId}, role_type = #{roleType}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
